scripts.build: tsc && vite build && cd emscripten && emcc -std=c11 index.c lib/camera.c lib/mat4.c lib/vec.c lib/loader.c -s USE_SDL=2 -s FULL_ES3=1 -s WASM=1 --preload-file ../public/rainbowtree.obj@rainbowtree.obj --preload-file positions.txt --preload-file normals.txt && cd .. && cp -t ./dist/emscripten emscripten/a.out.js emscripten/a.out.wasm emscripten/a.out.data
